title: Supply, Delivery of Various Items and Provision of Services and Minor Works under Framework Contract for the 2026/2027FY
description_short: Supply, Delivery of Various Items and Provision of Services and Minor Works under Framework Contract for the 2026/2027FY — Procurement notice from Accountant General Department
description_long: Procurement notice for Supply, Delivery of Various Items and Provision of Services and Minor Works under Framework Contract for the 2026/2027FY. Published by Accountant General Department through the Public Procurement and Disposal of Assets Authority (PPDA).
